description: Non-live example scaffold for United Kingdom manufacturer direct availability targets. These targets are placeholders only and are not validated.
notes: UK must not be grouped into EU.
Tax, duty, fulfilment, shipping rules, currency, and retailer relevance differ from EU.
Do not run this file as production configuration.

targets.marketNotes: Placeholder only. Confirm UK fulfilment source, currency, product format, and stock semantics before use.
